results.title: New York Knicks star OG Anunoby explains how 2K game made him a Mets fan
results.description: OG Anunoby has hardly had a moment’s rest since hoisting the Larry O’Brien with the New York Knicks earlier this month. Naturally, there have been media appearances, morning television interviews and open-top parades all around New York City, but he has rarely looked happier than when he was out on the grass at the Citi Field in Queens on Sunday.

results.title: 'It doesn’t make sense': Jessica Pegula compares Vondrousova suspension with Sinner and Swiatek doping cases
results.description: Jessica Pegula has questioned the consistency of anti-doping rulings in tennis after Marketa Vondrousová’s four-year suspension sparked renewed debate across the sport, drawing direct comparisons with previous cases involving Jannik Sinner and Iga Swiatek.
